target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Vehicle shows no visible deformations, holes, scorching, or missing components; all major components appear intact and functional; vehicle is actively moving, generating dust, indicating operational status.

summary: One military equipment target assessed: 1 vehicle, condition NO DAMAGE, CONFIRMED. The vehicle’s operational status, confirmed by dust cloud and intact appearance, indicates it is functional and likely mission-capable.
